output: Implemented batch T4 by rewriting the resize hook and canvas tests to the unified `onClipEdgeResizeEnd({ session, updates, cancelled })` contract. The hook tests now cover free, interior, and outer commit paths, the existing grouped/off-center canvas assertions were preserved against the new callback payload, and a new end-to-end free-clip resize test verifies sibling snapping on release. Both full test modules pass, and the batch checkpoint was written to `.megaplan/plans/collapse-the-three-parallel-20260408-1934/execution_batch_4.json`.
